meaning: n.射线照片,X光照片v.拍...的射线照片,拍射线照片
examples: The fulcrum bending radiograph has potential predictive utility.
Methods 15 patients with acute volvulus were examined by using dynamic radiograph.
This is a radiograph of an osteosarcoma involving the metaphyseal region of the distal femur.
Give a group of cardiologists high-quality coronary angiograms (a type of radiograph or x-ray) of typical patients and they will disagree about the diagnosis for about half of the patients.
